title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER A — Sara+Eva Sandy Toes duo dance
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Sandy Toes.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block.
prompt: Wide front-facing music-video shot — designed pastel beach backdrop. SKY: soft sky-blue to seafoam gradient. GROUND: stylized golden-sand floor with cartoon-shape seashells in pinks, corals, and creams scattered around. Tiny seashell confetti and fluffy cloud-shapes drift gently down the frame from above. NO real beach, NO real ocean, NO scene clutter, NO logos, NO real text. @Sara on the LEFT and @Eva on the RIGHT stand side-by-side facing the camera, both barefoot and grinning huge. Sara holds a yellow plastic sand-bucket. Eva holds a tiny pink shovel. STRICT ANATOMY: each girl has EXACTLY 2 arms, EXACTLY 2 hands — both hands ALWAYS holding their bucket / shovel prop OR returning to start position. They perform a choreographed beach-day duo loop — LOWER BODY + HEAD only since hands are occupied: bop right hip, bop left hip, knees bend slightly, head bobs side-to-side, both girls take a small step toward each other and CLINK their bucket and shovel together at center, step back, repeat. Movements are RHYTHMIC and LOOPABLE — clean cycle: bop → bop → step-in-and-clink → step-back → return. Camera locked, head-on, kid-eye-level. Bright cheerful pastel beach lighting. Sara and Eva hum and sing along generically — no specific dialogue, no lip-sync to any words. The shot is designed to LOOP cleanly. No audible speech, no music — silent render.
